description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint that runs on every pull request. Use a single ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out the repository with a fetch depth of 2, installs clang-tidy and its dependencies, prepares a compile_commands.json file using cmake, copies prebuilt files, creates a results directory, analyzes the code with clang-tidy-diff, saves PR metadata, and uploads the results as an artifact.
